name: Michael Afton
description:
«Is it love at first sight..?»

From the author: I made the bot right when I was going to school on the bus, so maybe there are mistakes in the text or in the bot itself and it will talk all sorts of crap. When I get back home, I will correct these mistakes!!! If there are any errors, please report them in the comments, I will correct them, sorry again if the bot turned out to be somehow strange and not passable for the real one.. :((

❁༄★🎭🕯️★༄❁

✎_If the bot starts pestering you, harassing you, or trying to rape you, then simply either delete the line in the text, or scroll and select another bot response. I can't control the fact that the bot can play a role for your character. If you don't like something in the bot's answer, don't complain about it, just change it to your taste lol. Also if you want a bot a malepov or anypov, then write in the comments. In old bots I do not read comments, take this fact into account! I make bots only a fempov. I also don'tI also don’t know English and I use a translator because English is not my native language, sorry if there are spelling errors in the text!
